hero.title: OpenClaw Agent Market
hero.description: Install production-ready OpenClaw agent templates into managed instances, bootstrap the standard agent workspace files, and turn on the collaboration settings needed for multi-agent execution.
hero.multiAgentNote: Every install writes the OpenClaw standard workspace files and enables agent-to-agent collaboration for the target instance.

section.title: Curated agent catalog
section.description: Start from common orchestration, engineering, operations, research, and support roles instead of hand-authoring every OpenClaw agent from scratch.

searchPlaceholder: Search agent roles, capabilities, or keywords...

error.title: Unable to load installable OpenClaw instances
error.description: The agent catalog is available, but config-backed OpenClaw instance discovery failed. Retry after the managed runtime services, local bridge, and runtime metadata are available again.

empty.searchDescription: Try another keyword or switch categories to find a template that fits the workflow you want to install.
empty.noTargetsDescription: Create or connect a config-backed OpenClaw runtime. Built-in and local-external instances appear here only when this host exposes a writable OpenClaw config file.

modal.title: Install agent template
modal.instanceSummaryTitle: Agents already present in this instance

toast.installSuccessDescription: {{name}} is now available in the selected OpenClaw instance.

orchestrator.name: Orchestrator
orchestrator.summary: Coordinate multiple specialists, decompose tasks, and keep delivery aligned.
orchestrator.description: A control-plane agent for routing work, checking progress, and deciding when to parallelize versus execute locally.
orchestrator.focus: Keeps multi-agent execution disciplined and traceable.

coding-engineer.name: Coding Engineer
coding-engineer.summary: Implement features, debug code, and work through bounded engineering tasks.
coding-engineer.description: Optimized for code changes, small refactors, test repairs, and pragmatic delivery inside existing repositories.
coding-engineer.focus: Prefers concrete patches and defensible engineering tradeoffs.

ops-responder.name: Ops Responder
ops-responder.summary: Handle incidents, triage runtime failures, and drive operational recovery.
ops-responder.description: Designed for incident response, runbook execution, rollback decisions, and controlled mitigation under pressure.
ops-responder.focus: Fast diagnosis, explicit evidence, and low-risk containment.

research-analyst.name: Research Analyst
research-analyst.summary: Collect evidence, compare sources, and turn findings into structured decisions.
research-analyst.description: Useful for competitor scans, requirements research, root-cause analysis, and evidence-driven briefs.
research-analyst.focus: Prioritizes evidence, traceability, and concise analysis.

content-writer.name: Content Writer
content-writer.summary: Draft launch copy, product documentation, and polished stakeholder messaging.
content-writer.description: Useful for docs, announcements, product narratives, and editing work that needs structure and consistency.
content-writer.focus: Clear structure, tone discipline, and audience-aware writing.

support-triage.name: Support Triage
support-triage.summary: Classify inbound issues, gather missing context, and route users to the right resolution path.
support-triage.description: Built for frontline support intake, ticket hygiene, and user-facing troubleshooting workflows.
support-triage.focus: Reduce ambiguity quickly and keep support flows actionable.
